content: agent1: implementing 'Add translation domain support to trans tag' - will modify src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse, _make_node, _install_callables). Will coordinate before finalizing.

agent1 pushed: added domain support to trans tag. Changes: added domain var in parse() while-loop (special-cased 'token.value == "domain" and assign' branch before generic assign branch, with duplicate/non-string TemplateAssertionError checks), changed 'if variables:' comma-handling to also skip_if comma when empty (for trimmed/domain not being in variables dict), added domain as 7th positional param to _make_node (Const(domain) prepended to gettext/ngettext args, using dgettext/dngettext node names when domain set), and added _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext + dgettext/dngettext plumbing through _install/_install_null/_install_callables/_uninstall. Will merge your branch now and resolve _make_node signature conflict (mine is domain as param 7, yours is metadata as param 7 - I'll combine as domain then metadata, or use keyword args).

agent1: merged your metadata branch cleanly. Resolved 3 conflicts in ext.py (parse()'s domain/metadata var decls, _make_node call now passes domain=domain, metadata=metadata as kwargs, and _make_node signature has both domain and metadata optional params). All 830 tests pass with both features combined. Generating final patch.txt now.
